0.text: Scarring in the posterior costal pleura of the right hemithorax

1.text: Segmental and subsegmental tubular bronchiectasis in both lungs

3.text: Central-peripheral crazy paving pattern with small, patchy, faintly limited ground-glass opacities in the left lung inferior lingular segment

4.text: Central-peripheral crazy paving pattern with small, patchy, faintly limited ground-glass opacities in the left lung lower lobe basal segment

5.text: Central-peripheral crazy paving pattern with small, patchy, faintly limited ground-glass opacities in the right lung middle lobe

6.text: Scarring and atelectasis in the right lung middle lobe medial segment

7.text: Scarring and atelectasis in the left lung upper lobe inferior lingular segment

8.text: Scarring and atelectasis in both lung lower lobe basal segments

9.text: Several subcentimeter nonspecific pulmonary nodules in the lung parenchyma, stable
